name: llm-routing
description: Multi-model routing: Orchestrator (qwen2.5:3b) routes to Worker (qwen2.5:7b), Reasoner (deepseek-r1:7b), or Escalate (Claude). Key files: orchestratorModel.ts, queryModelRouter.ts, modelPool.ts. Enable via LOCAL_FIRST=true and USE_LLM_ORCHESTRATOR=true. Tool calling requires Ollama models with tool template in Modelfile.

content: Canopy prompt tool names must match runtime tool names exactly: WebSearch (not WebSearchTool), Read (not FileReadTool/ReadTool), Edit (not FileEditTool), Write (not FileWriteTool), Bash (not BashTool), Glob (not ListFilesTool/GlobTool), Grep (not GrepTool). Source: .canopy/prompts.jsonl local-system entry. Cache: .claude/.local-prompt-cache

title: Remove coordinator training from v7
rationale: When LOCAL_FIRST=true, toolPool.ts bypasses applyCoordinatorToolFilter() so the local model gets all 30 tools directly. Coordinator delegation training (Agent+TaskStop only) contradicts this runtime behavior and confuses the model.

name: v7-training-pipeline
description: Fine-tuning pipeline: (1) generate_v6_training.py → train.jsonl (2) finetune_tool_calling.py with --gpu 0 --epochs 3 --batch-size 2 --lora-r 16 (3) convert_to_gguf.sh merged/ → GGUF (4) ollama create with Modelfile. Venv: docker_scripts/ollama/.venv (has unsloth+torch). Output: claude-explorer-model/v7/{lora_adapter,merged}. GPU0 (RTX 3090) preferred.

name: tool-loop-detection
description: Small models (3B) get stuck calling the same MCP tool repeatedly when tool results are large (15KB+). Fix in queryModelRouter.ts handleLocalAction(): scan last N assistant messages for consecutive identical tool_use calls. When threshold (2+) hit, remove looped tool from tool list and inject last tool result into system prompt with instructions to synthesize an answer.

title: Route interactive REPL through Ollama when no API key
rationale: When LOCAL_FIRST=true and no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, shouldUseProviderAbstraction() in queryEngineIntegration.ts must return true so interactive queries route through Ollama. Previously returned false to avoid duplicate requests with queryModelWithRouting, but some code paths (interactive REPL startup) go through queryModelWithStreaming directly, falling through to Anthropic and crashing.

content: Logo header in logoV2Utils.ts getLogoDisplayData() shows billingType. When LOCAL_FIRST=true, override to show 'Local · {OLLAMA_MODEL}' instead of 'Sonnet 4.6 · API Usage Billing'. Uses OLLAMA_MODEL env var, falls back to LOCAL_MODEL, then 'Ollama'.

name: ollama-memory-recall
description: Memory recall (findRelevantMemories.ts) was hardcoded to Anthropic sideQuery. Fixed by importing sideQueryProvider.ts which supports Ollama. When LOCAL_FIRST=true or OLLAMA_BASE_URL set, uses SIDE_QUERY_OLLAMA_MODEL for memory selection. Original Anthropic path preserved as fallback.

name: preserve-memory-in-system-reminder-strip
description: queryModelRouter.ts stripSystemReminders() was nuking all <system-reminder> blocks, which contained claudeMd and memory content. Fixed to extract and preserve claudeMd, memory, and currentDate sections while still stripping the full Claude system prompt and git status that overwhelm small models.

content: Local models (qwen2.5/claude-explorer) often wrap JSON in markdown fences or prose. Always use extractJson() helper before JSON.parse when parsing local model output. Handles: raw JSON, markdown-fenced, and embedded-in-prose patterns.

name: memory-architecture-three-channels
description: Memory reaches LLM via 3 channels: (1) System prompt - loadMemoryPrompt() → MEMORY.md, always works. (2) User context - prependUserContext() → claudeMd in <system-reminder>, needs preservation in stripSystemReminders. (3) Dynamic recall - findRelevantMemories() → sideQuery selecting top 5, needs Ollama-aware provider. Files: src/memdir/, src/services/llm/sideQueryProvider.ts, src/services/extractMemories/, src/services/autoDream/, src/services/SessionMemory/.

name: lancedb-response-fields
description: LanceDB Central API: query endpoint returns .records, search endpoint returns .results — different field names for the same concept. Always verify response field names per endpoint.
LanceDB table list returns objects [{name:'...'}] not strings. jq filter .tables[]? won't match — must use .tables[]?.name for existence checks.
resolution: Changed jq from .tables[]? to .tables[]?.name in both scripts

name: lancedb-embed-workaround
description: LanceDB /embed endpoint broken (OLLAMA_URL=ollama-embed). Workaround: embed via Ollama directly and use query_vector instead of query_text.

content: 3-layer dedup: Layer 1 content_hash (O(1)), Layer 2 source_url (O(1)), Layer 3 semantic vector via Ollama+query_vector. Scripts at .claude/skills/web-research/scripts/.

title: LanceDB API paths
rationale: Discovered via OpenAPI spec and iterative testing against live API

name: rag-systemprompt-injection
description: RAG from past successes: handleLocalAction ignores params.systemPrompt, using getLocalSystemPrompt() instead. Pass RAG context via _ragContext property on params, then append inside handleLocalAction after getLocalSystemPrompt(). Don't try to override systemPrompt in the params object.

content: LanceDB REST API uses /dbs/{db}/tables/{table}/ingest (not /insert). Tables auto-create on first ingest. Schema evolves automatically when new fields appear. Rate limit: 30 req/min — use batch inserts with delays.

name: training-data-flywheel
description: Training data pipeline: JSONL (session logs with modelUsed/routingDecision/latencyMs/toolOutcome metadata) → ETL batch ingest to LanceDB (with nomic-embed-text embeddings) → RAG retrieval of high-quality examples (quality>=0.7, feedback!='down') → augment local model system prompt with few-shot context. Controlled by RAG_ENABLED=true env var.
esbuild stubs certain modules (e.g. utils/sessionId.js). Commands importing from stubbed modules get empty exports at runtime.
resolution: Import getSessionId from bootstrap/state.js. Use local-jsx pattern: export async function call(onDone, context, args). Don't import 'ink' directly — use onDone() for output.
